news.title: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
news.title_cn: 傑米戴蒙表示，從長遠來看，伊朗戰爭使中東和平前景更好

news.title: Kuwait says Strait of Hormuz closure is beyond catastrophic, will trigger domino effect across global economy
news.title_cn: 科威特表示霍爾木茲海峽的關閉不僅僅是災難性的，將引發全球經濟的骨牌效應

news.title: Pakistan offers to facilitate U.S.-Iran war talks as Trump and Tehran give mixed signals
news.title_cn: 川普和德黑蘭發出混合訊號，巴基斯坦提出協助美伊戰爭談判

news.title: Arm releases first in-house chip, with Meta as debut customer
news.title_cn: Arm 發表首款自研晶片，Meta 成為首款客戶

news.title: Senate, White House start to coalesce around ending DHS shutdown amid TSA delays
news.title_cn: 由於運輸安全管理局 (TSA) 延誤，參議院和白宮開始就結束國土安全部 (DHS) 關閉問題進行聯合

news.title: Iran war has altered the global natural gas market. Goldman says these 3 stocks will benefit
news.title_cn: 伊朗戰爭改變了全球天然氣市場。高盛表示這三隻股票將受益

news.title: Long airport lines may soon disappear as senators sound hopeful on funding deal
news.title_cn: 由於參議員對融資協議充滿希望，機場長隊可能很快就會消失

news.title: Oil prices rally as Pentagon reportedly plans to deploy 3,000 troops to the Middle East
news.title_cn: 據報道五角大廈計劃向中東部署 3,000 名士兵，油價上漲
